metadata.description: Agent plugins by e-roux — works with both GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code

plugins.name: vulcan
plugins.description: Expert agent for GitHub Copilot CLI plugins, extensions, and standalone SDK applications (TypeScript)

plugins.name: make
plugins.description: Makefile-centric project workflow with .SILENT, .ONESHELL, mandatory qa target

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: General-purpose development guards: no hardcoded secrets, no direct main pushes, self-documenting code

plugins.name: infra
plugins.description: Infrastructure automation agent for cloud and on-premise environments

plugins.name: web-browser
plugins.description: CDP-based Chrome automation for web design verification: navigate, interact, and inspect live browser state

plugins.name: billing
plugins.description: Track GitHub Copilot CLI token consumption and premium request spend from local session data
